ふっふーん。今日もお客さんをノックアウトしちゃったもんね～♪: Fufuun! I knocked out another customer today!♪
しれーかんとの稽古で『きじょーい』を覚えてからは、<br>ここのお客相手には無敗:
Ever since I learned the 'Feels Good Hold' from training with the
Commander, I haven't lost a single match against the customers here!
よーし、ここの猛者たちを全員倒したら、<br>今度こそしれーかんを叩きのめしてや:
Alright, after I beat all the tough customers here, I'm gonna thrash

ルカさん。お客様から指名が入ったんだけどお願い出来るかしら？<br>なんだか身体:
Luca, a client has requested you. Could you handle it? He seems to be
a big, strong man. Are you sure you're okay with that?
誰が相手だって、へーき、へーき！<br>なんてったって、あたしは世界一の格闘家に:
No problem, no problem! No matter who, I'm fine! After all, I'm the

個室に入って来たのは、がっしりとした体格の筋肉質の男だった。<br>男は最近前線:
The one who entered the private room was a large, muscular man. He
introduced himself as a mercenary newly arrived at the Frontline Base.
お嬢ちゃん、格闘技やってるんだって？ いいね～。: I hear you do martial arts, missy? Niiice.
客の男はそう言うと、不敵な笑みを浮かべる。: Saying that, the customer flashed a fearless grin.

(This guy... he's clearly had a lot of training. And his face seems
familiar somehow... is it just my imagination?)
お客さんも、相当鍛えてるみたいですね。<br>素晴らしい上腕二頭筋ですし。:
You seem to be pretty well-trained yourself, sir. Those are some

ルカはそう言って笑顔を見せると、男の手を引いてベッドへと歩いていく。: Luca smiled, took the man's hand, and led him to the bed.
（試合開始した途端、不意打ちでタックルを仕掛けて、<br>得意の『きじょーい』に:
The moment the match starts, I surprise-tackle 'em, then go right into
my signature 'Feels Good Hold'—a golden pattern!
ルカは歩きながらいつもの流れを脳内でシミュレートする。<br>しかし……: Luca mentally ran through her usual routine as she walked. But...
客の男が急に立ち止まり、ルカの腕を掴んだのだった。: The customer suddenly stopped and grabbed Luca's arm.
